default_summary.markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between GrowthX and Firework to discuss SEO strategy and content performance improvements.](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=3.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Indexing issues persist (40% of articles not indexed), likely due to slow page load times](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [New content workflows and refreshes showing promising results (3,000 impressions/week, up from \~200)](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [AI-assisted content refreshes significantly outperform original human-written articles](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
  - [Webflow migration planned for Monday/Tuesday to address technical issues](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)

## Topics

### Indexing and Performance Issues

  - [40% of 100 published articles not indexed by Google](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Slow page load times likely contributing to indexing problems](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=131.0)
  - [Moving to Webflow setup to improve performance, similar to other successful projects](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Content quality and relevance also factors in poor performance](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=226.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [New content workflows yielding better results (3,000 impressions/week, up from \~200)](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=926.0)
  - [AI-assisted content refreshes showing significant improvements:](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)
      - [Example: 200 daily impressions increased to 600](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1087.0)
      - [Clicks increased from 0-1 to 3-4 daily](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1054.0)

### AI vs. Human Content

  - [AI-edited human content (59% AI detection score) outperforming purely AI-generated content (70-80% score)](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1493.0)
  - [Experiment showed AI-refreshed content dramatically improved impressions for previously underperforming articles](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1709.0)

### Technical Optimizations

  - [Webflow migration planned for Monday/Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Cleaning up \~200 "dead weight" articles out of 400 total](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Implementing topic clusters for better SEO juice distribution](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1181.0)
  - [Adding author profiles with LinkedIn links to improve E-A-T signals](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)

### Content Production Workflow

  - [Multiple complex workflows (up to 50 steps) for content creation and optimization](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)
  - [Considering adding AI detection score checks to workflow](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)

### Measurement and Reporting

  - [Implementing ICP (Ideal Customer Profile) scoring for blog visitors](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Setting up webhooks to track visitor job titles and companies](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1675.0)
  - [Aiming to bring 500 ICPs per month through content](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1721.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Launch Webflow migration on Monday/Tuesday](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=523.0)
  - [Implement author profiles with LinkedIn links](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1424.0)
  - [Increase content refresh rate to 10 articles per week](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1604.0)
  - [Set up ICP scoring system for visitor tracking](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1447.0)
  - [Experiment with GPT-generated "indexability scores" for content](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1811.0)
  - [Clean up and redirect underperforming content](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1150.0)
  - [Continue optimizing content workflows based on performance data](https://fathom.video/share/-md8CAyxz-WUYReXJFT8LRyZRXg-AJPw?tab=summary&timestamp=1887.0)

action_items.description: Set up Webflow instance for blog by Mon/Tue next week
Set up ICP scoring system for traffic quality & topic selection
Create author profile pages w/ LinkedIn profiles & bios for blog authors
Run 0GPT test on human vs AI-edited content, compare scores/performance
Increase content refresh rate to 10/week, double current output
Implement new content workflows from successful client examples
Provide credentials to Jimmy for ICP scoring system setup
